title: Prove the cold dispatch decision: nothing to do, one clear choice, and a refusal
action: The design rests on one cold agent reading enough external state to decide correctly, so prove the decision before proving the spawn. Run the dispatch role with --dry-run three times and record every transcript verbatim in the reference document. (a) Against this repo's real backlog: today docs/backlog.md has one in-flight row, PBI-043, whose slug already has a worktree grant, so the honest answer is nothing to dispatch. Note in the document that the real dispatchable set is empty until a human runs exploring per item - a stranger must not read the empty result as a bug. (b) Against a fixture under .bee/tmp/ where exactly one ordinary row is dispatchable: it names that PBI and gives a reason (D16). (c) Against a fixture carrying a hard-gate row AND a row whose lane cannot be classified: it dispatches neither and names each refusal reason (D6). In all three runs nothing is created outside the reference document.

truths: Run (a) concludes nothing is dispatchable and names what it examined, including the reverse index
Run (b) names exactly one PBI with a reason
Run (c) refuses both rows and names a distinct reason for each
No worktree grant is added by any run
Nothing under .claude/skills, .agents/skills or docs/ changes except the reference document

artifacts.substantive: three verbatim dry-run transcripts: empty, one choice, and a double refusal

prohibitions: Do not let any dry-run create a worktree, a pane, or a file outside the reference document
Do not seed a fixture inside docs/backlog.md; use .bee/tmp/
Do not weaken case (c) to make it pass

verify: set -e; F=.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/references/dispatch-dry-run.md; test -s "$F"; grep -qi 'nothing to dispatch' "$F"; grep -qi 'hard-gate' "$F"; grep -qi 'unclassifiable' "$F"; G=$(node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(Object.keys(JSON.parse(s).grants||{}).length))"); test "$G" = 2; test -z "$(git status --porcelain -- docs .claude/skills .agents/skills | grep -v 'herdr-orchestrating')"; diff -q "$F" .agents/skills/herdr-orchestrating/references/dispatch-dry-run.md; echo DECISION_PROVEN
